name: Title Sync

releases.author: igor-kupczynski
releases.description: Patch release addressing Obsidian community bot feedback on sentence case for UI text.

releases.author: igor-kupczynski
releases.description:
## What's New

Initial stable release of Title Sync plugin.

### Features

- **Manual sync command**: "Title Sync: Sync title to filename" 
- Extracts the first H1 header from markdown (skips frontmatter and code blocks)
- Transforms titles to valid filenames (strips formatting, handles special chars)
- Shows notifications on success/failure

### Installation

Download `main.js` and `manifest.json` and place them in your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/title-sync/` directory.

Or search for "Title Sync" in Obsidian's Community Plugins browser.

releases.author: igor-kupczynski
releases.description:
Initial release of Title Sync plugin for Obsidian.

## Features

- **Single command**: "Title Sync: Sync title to filename"
- Extracts the first H1 header after frontmatter (skips code blocks)
- Transforms the title to a valid filename:
  - Strips markdown formatting (bold, italic, links)
  - Replaces illegal filename characters with dashes
  - Truncates to 200 characters for cross-platform compatibility
- Shows notification on success/failure

## Installation

1. Download `main.js` and `manifest.json` from this release
2. Create a folder `title-sync` in your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/` directory
3. Copy the downloaded files into the folder
4. Reload Obsidian
5. Enable the plugin in Settings > Community Plugins
releases.name: v0.0.1
